articles.title: LACUNA: A Testbed for Evaluating Localization Precision for LLM Unlearning
articles.abstract: LLMs memorize sensitive training data, including personally identifiable information (PII), creating a pressing need for reliable post hoc removal methods. Unlearning has emerged as a promising solution, with state-of-the-art(SOTA) methods often following a localize-first, unlearn-second paradigm that targets specific model parameters. However, existing benchmarks evaluate unlearning solely at the output level, leaving open the question of whether unlearning truly erases knowledge from a model's parameters or merely obfuscates it, a concern reinforced by the success of resurfacing attacks. To bridge this gap, we introduce LACUNA: the first unlearning testbed with ground-truth parameter-level localization. LACUNA injects PII of synthetic individuals into predefined parameters of 1B and 7B OLMo-based models via masked continual pretraining, enabling direct evaluation of whether unlearning targets the weights responsible for knowledge storage. We use LACUNA to benchmark current SOTA unlearning methods and find that, despite strong output-level performance, existing methods are highly imprecise and susceptible to resurfacing attacks. We further show that when localization is successful, even a simple gradient-based unlearning method achieves strong erasure and robustness to resurfacing attacks, highlighting the importance of precise unlearning. We release LACUNA to complement behavioral evaluations and drive further advances in robust, localization-based unlearning.
articles.titleCn: LACUNA：用于评估LLM去学习本地化精度的测试平台
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型会记忆敏感的训练数据，包括个人身份信息（PII），这催生了对可靠的事后删除方法的迫切需求。去学习已成为一种有前景的解决方案，最先进（SOTA）的方法通常遵循“先定位，后去学习”的范式，针对特定的模型参数。然而，现有的基准仅在输出层面评估去学习，留下了去学习是否真正从模型参数中擦除知识，还是仅仅掩盖知识的问题，而重现攻击的成功进一步强化了这一担忧。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了LACUNA：首个具有真实参数级定位的去学习测试平台。LACUNA通过掩码持续预训练，将合成个体的PII注入到1B和7B OLMo模型的预定义参数中，从而能够直接评估去学习是否针对负责知识存储的权重。我们使用LACUNA来基准测试当前SOTA去学习方法，发现尽管在输出层面表现出色，但现有方法高度不精确且容易受到重现攻击的影响。我们进一步表明，当定位成功时，即使是一个简单的基于梯度的去学习方法也能实现强大的擦除效果，并对重现攻击具有鲁棒性，突显了精确去学习的重要性。我们发布LACUNA以补充行为评估，并推动基于定位的鲁棒去学习的进一步发展。

articles.title: Program-as-Weights: A Programming Paradigm for Fuzzy Functions
articles.abstract: Many everyday programming tasks resist clean rule-based implementation, such as alerting on important log lines, repairing malformed JSON, or ranking search results by intent, and are increasingly outsourced to large language model APIs at the cost of locality, reproducibility, and price. We propose fuzzy-function programming: compiling such a function from a natural-language specification into a compact, locally-executable neural artifact. We instantiate this paradigm with Program-as-Weights (PAW), in which a 4B compiler trained on FuzzyBench, a 10M-example dataset we release, emits parameter-efficient adapters for a frozen, lightweight interpreter. A 0.6B Qwen3 interpreter executing PAW programs matches the performance of direct prompting of Qwen3-32B, while using roughly one fiftieth of the inference memory and running at 30 tokens/s on a MacBook M3. PAW reframes the foundation model from a per-input problem solver into a tool builder: invoked once per function definition, it produces a small reusable artifact whose subsequent calls per function application are cheap and offline.
articles.titleCn: 程序即权重：模糊函数的一种编程范式
articles.abstractCn: 许多日常编程任务难以通过清晰的规则实现，例如对重要日志行进行告警、修复格式错误的JSON或根据意图对搜索结果进行排序，这些任务正越来越多地外包给大型语言模型API，代价是本地性、可重复性和价格的损失。我们提出了模糊函数编程：将这种函数从自然语言规范编译成一个紧凑的本地可执行神经工件。我们以程序作为权重（PAW）为例来实例化这一范式，其中在FuzzyBench（一个我们发布的包含1000万个示例的数据集）上训练的4B编译器会为冻结的轻量级解释器生成参数高效的适配器。一个0.6B Qwen3解释器执行PAW程序的性能与直接提示Qwen3-32B相当，同时仅使用大约二十分之一的推理内存，并在MacBook M3上以每秒30个token的速度运行。PAW将基础模型从每个输入的问题解决者转变为工具构建者：每次函数定义时调用一次，它会产生一个小型可重用工件，后续每次函数调用的成本都很低且可离线执行。

articles.title: Online Safety Monitoring for LLMs
articles.abstract: Despite alignment training, LLMs remain prone to generating unsafe outputs at deployment time. Monitoring outputs online and raising an alarm when safety can no longer be assumed is therefore critical. We study a simple real-time monitor that turns a verifier signal from an external model into an alarm decision by thresholding, with the threshold calibrated via risk control. In experiments on mathematical reasoning and red teaming datasets, we show that this simple design is competitive with more advanced monitors based on sequential hypothesis testing.
articles.titleCn: 大型语言模型在线安全监控
articles.abstractCn: 尽管经过对齐训练，大语言模型在部署时仍然容易生成不安全的输出。因此，在线监控输出并在安全假设不再成立时发出警报至关重要。我们研究了一种简单的实时监控器，通过阈值化将外部模型的验证信号转换为警报决策，并通过风险控制校准该阈值。在数学推理和红队测试数据集上的实验表明，这种简单设计在性能上与基于顺序假设检验的更高级监控器具有竞争力。

articles.title: What LLM Agents Say When No One Is Watching: Social Structure and Latent Objective Emergence in Multi-Agent Debates
articles.abstract: LLM agents will increasingly act in socially structured settings where role, audience, and relational context can shape what is advantageous or costly to say. We study whether such social structure, without any explicit objective in the prompt, changes what an agent expresses publicly relative to an off-the-record (OTR) channel elicited under the same condition. We introduce a dual-channel debate framework in which agents produce public utterances that enter the shared history alongside OTR responses that are recorded but never shown to the other participant. Across 10 models, 3 scenarios, and 5 variations within each scenario, alignment-inducing settings produce systematic public-OTR divergence in the targeted agent, with its decision divergence rising from a $\sim$3% baseline to roughly 40%. The effect is consistent across four aggregate analyses: stance, semantic similarity, natural language inference, and survey responses. In some cases, the OTR response explicitly attributes public accommodation to relational pressures, such as career risk or sponsorship obligation. The findings suggest that agent evaluation should extend beyond explicit goals and detect emergent objectives. We present a dual-channel evaluation framework and complementary behavioral measures that operationalize this assessment.
articles.titleCn: 无人监视时大语言模型代理所言：多智能体辩论中的社会结构与潜在目标涌现
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型代理将越来越多地在具有社会结构的环境中发挥作用，其中角色、受众和关系背景可以决定说出某些话是有利还是有代价。我们研究了这种社会结构，在没有提示中明确目标的情况下，是否会改变代理在公开渠道（相对于非公开渠道）中表达的内容。我们引入了一个双渠道辩论框架，其中代理产生公开言论，这些言论会进入共享历史，同时记录非公开回应，但这些回应永远不会展示给另一方参与者。在10个模型、3个场景和每个场景下的5个变化中，促使一致性的设置在目标代理中产生了系统性的公开-非公开分歧，其决策分歧从约3%的基线上升到大约40%。这种效应在四个综合分析中保持一致：立场、语义相似度、自然语言推理和调查回应。在某些情况下，非公开回应明确地将公开适应归因于关系压力，例如职业风险或赞助义务。这些发现表明，代理评估应超越明确目标，并检测涌现目标。我们提出了一个双渠道评估框架和补充行为指标，以实现这种评估。

articles.title: Reasoning LLM Improves Speaker Recognition in Long-form TV Dramas
articles.abstract: Long-form TV dramas present a formidable challenge for comprehensive video understanding, where deciphering complex storyline often relies on \textbf{speaker recognition}, the task of accurately attributing each spoken utterance to its respective character. In this paper, we advance this field through two primary contributions. (1) We introduce \textbf{DramaSR-532K}, a large-scale benchmark comprising 532K annotated dialogue lines across more than 900 unique characters, necessitating the integration of auditory, linguistic, and visual cues for speaker recognition. (2) We propose \textbf{DramaSR-LRM}, a robust approach built upon a large reasoning model (LRM). DramaSR-LRM is designed to autonomously aggregate contextual evidence via multimodal tool-use, synthesizing diverse inputs to achieve high-fidelity attribution. Experimental results demonstrate that DramaSR-LRM significantly outperforms existing baselines, particularly on short utterances where acoustic biometrics are inherently unreliable. \textit{All the data and code will be made publicly available at the project page: https://www.github.com/198808xc/DramaSR-LRM.}
articles.titleCn: 推理式大语言模型提升长篇电视剧中的说话人识别
articles.abstractCn: 长篇电视剧为全面视频理解带来了严峻挑战，其中解读复杂剧情往往依赖于**说话人识别**，即准确将每段对话归属到相应角色。本文通过两大主要贡献推进了该领域的发展。(1) 我们引入了**DramaSR-532K**，这是一个大规模基准，包含超过900个独特角色的532K标注对话行，需要整合听觉、语言和视觉线索进行说话人识别。(2) 我们提出了基于大型推理模型（LRM）的**DramaSR-LRM**，这是一种鲁棒的方法。DramaSR-LRM旨在通过多模态工具使用自主聚合上下文证据，综合多样输入以实现高保真归属。实验结果表明，DramaSR-LRM显著优于现有基线，尤其是在短对话片段中，其中声学生物特征本身就不稳定可靠。**所有数据和代码将在项目页面公开发布：https://www.github.com/198808xc/DramaSR-LRM。**

articles.title: Towards Robustness against Typographic Attack with Training-free Concept Localization
articles.abstract: Models trained via Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) serve as the foundational vision encoders for most modern Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs). Despite their widespread adoption, CLIP models exhibit a critical yet underexplored failure mode: irrelevant text appearing within images confounds visual representations, biasing them toward lexical meaning rather than true visual semantics. This robustness issue, commonly described as a Typographic Attack (TA), exposes a vulnerability that poses a significant risk to safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving. To achieve interpretable and effective robustness against TA, we propose a novel, training-free mechanistic interpretability method. Our method provides sampling-based interpretations of hidden state representations and quantitatively attributes semantic versus lexical focus to individual attention heads. Through probabilistic analysis and circuit mining, we isolate specific Vision Transformer (ViT) components that disproportionately encode lexical information, thereby identifying the mechanistic source of TA. We further show that simple interventions applied directly to the identified circuits, without any additional training, can substantially improve robustness against Typographic Attacks in object classification. These interventions, such as selective adjustment of attention weights, also outperform both supervised and training-free defense methods. Our experiments demonstrate that applying the proposed intervention to the vision encoders of several state-of-the-art LVLMs yields substantial gains in Visual Question Answering accuracy under Typographic Attack interference on RIO-Bench. These results confirm both the efficacy and the generalizability of our mechanistic approach. Code is released at https://github.com/Liu-524/SamplingTAR.
articles.comment: 15 pages main text, provisionally accepted to ECCV 2026
articles.titleCn: 面向免训练概念定位的排版攻击鲁棒性
articles.abstractCn: 通过对比语言-图像预训练（CLIP）训练的模型作为大多数现代视觉语言模型（LVLMs）的基础视觉编码器。尽管CLIP模型被广泛采用，但它们表现出一种关键且尚未深入探索的失效模式：图像中出现的无关文本会干扰视觉表征，使其偏向词汇意义而非真实的视觉语义。这种鲁棒性问题通常被描述为一种排版攻击（TA），暴露了可能对自动驾驶等安全关键应用构成重大风险的漏洞。为了实现针对TA的可解释且有效的鲁棒性，我们提出了一种新颖的无训练机制可解释性方法。我们的方法提供基于采样的隐藏状态表征解释，并将语义与词汇焦点定量分配给单个注意力头。通过概率分析和电路挖掘，我们隔离了那些不成比例地编码词汇信息的特定视觉Transformer（ViT）组件，从而确定了TA的机制来源。我们进一步表明，直接应用于已识别电路的简单干预措施，无需任何额外训练，可以显著提高对象分类中针对排版攻击的鲁棒性。这些干预措施，如选择性调整注意力权重，也优于监督和无训练防御方法。我们的实验表明，将所提出的干预措施应用于几种最先进的LVLMs的视觉编码器，在RIO-Bench上受到排版攻击干扰时，视觉问答准确率显著提高。这些结果证实了我们机制方法的功效和泛化能力。代码已发布在https://github.com/Liu-524/SamplingTAR。

articles.title: Visually Grounded Self-Reflection for Vision-Language Models via Reinforcement Learning
articles.abstract: Large vision-language models can reason over multimodal inputs by generating textual chains of thought (CoT). A key capability exhibited in CoT reasoning is self-reflection: revisiting earlier decisions and correcting previous errors. However, existing LVLMs often fail to properly attend to visual inputs during reflection, limiting their ability to translate feedback into grounded corrections, especially for out-of-distribution images. To address this issue, we propose a novel reinforcement learning training framework VRRL, with two components explicitly designed to elicit visually grounded self-reflection. First, we randomly mask trajectory prefixes during training to emphasize recovery from incorrect intermediate predictions rather than making early mistakes. Second, we introduce buffered roll-ins from an experience replay buffer to expose the model to diverse failure states that it must learn to correct. We evaluate our approach on visual grounding tasks involving tables and charts, as well as spatial navigation benchmarks. While off-the-shelf and conventionally fine-tuned models degrade substantially under distribution shift, our method substantially improves average out-of-distribution accuracy over standard RL and reflection-oriented fine-tuning baselines by using self-reflection effectively.
articles.titleCn: 基于视觉的强化学习驱动的视觉-语言模型自我反思
articles.abstractCn: 大型视觉语言模型可以通过生成文本形式的思维链（CoT）来对多模态输入进行推理。思维链推理中的一个关键能力是自我反思：回顾先前的决策并纠正之前的错误。然而，现有的视觉语言模型在反思过程中往往无法正确关注视觉输入，限制了它们将反馈转化为有根据的修正的能力，尤其是在处理分布外图像时。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的强化学习训练框架VRRL，该框架包含两个明确设计的组件，用于激发基于视觉的自我反思。首先，我们在训练过程中随机遮蔽轨迹前缀，以强调从错误的中间预测中恢复，而不是犯早期错误。其次，我们引入了从经验回放缓冲区的缓冲式回放，以向模型展示它必须学习纠正的各种失败状态。我们在涉及表格和图表的视觉定位任务以及空间导航基准测试上评估了我们的方法。虽然现成的和常规微调的模型在分布偏移下会显著退化，但我们的方法通过有效利用自我反思，显著提高了相对于标准强化学习和以反思为导向的微调基线的分布外平均准确率。

articles.title: Audio-Based Understanding of Audiobook Narration Appeal
articles.abstract: Narration is central to the audiobook listening experience, shaping how listeners engage with and understand the content. This work explores how narration qualities shape an audiobook's appeal, noting that their effects can vary by genre, title, and audience. We extract vocal and acoustic features (e.g., tone, pace, loudness) from LibriVox using pre-trained audio models and analyse their relationship with consumption data (specifically, view-rate) and their interplay with genre and title. Despite limited consumption data, we find that acoustic information alone has a robust association with appeal, even after accounting for title effects. We further validate these findings using more nuanced proprietary engagement metrics. To our knowledge, this is the first systematic computational study linking narration qualities, genre, title, and audiobook consumption, highlighting the potential of data-driven insights to improve audiobook personalisation and narrator casting.
articles.titleCn: 基于音频的播客叙述吸引力理解
articles.abstractCn: 旁白是听书体验的核心，它塑造了听众如何参与和理解内容的方式。本研究探讨了旁白质量如何影响听书的吸引力，并指出其效果会因类型、标题和听众而异。我们使用预训练的音频模型从LibriVox中提取声音和声学特征（如音调、语速、音量），分析这些特征与消费数据（特别是观看率）之间的关系，以及它们与类型和标题的相互作用。尽管消费数据有限，我们发现仅声学信息就与吸引力有显著关联，即使在考虑了标题效应后也是如此。我们进一步使用更精细的自有参与度指标验证了这些发现。据我们所知，这是首次系统性地将旁白质量、类型、标题和听书消费联系起来的计算研究，突出了数据驱动洞察在改进听书个性化和 narrator 选角方面的潜力。

articles.title: TestEvo-Bench: An Executable and Live Benchmark for Test and Code Co-Evolution

authors.name: Kaiyuan Wang
authors.affiliation: Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and SWE-Agent

articles.abstract: Software tests and code evolve together: a code change should be followed by new or updated tests that record the new software behavior. Yet existing test generation and update benchmarks often isolate the test from the code change, and rely on static metadata that does not verify whether a test is executable or semantically tied to the code change. This makes it difficult to evaluate whether a test automation agent understands how a code change should propagate into the test suite. We introduce TestEvo-Bench, a benchmark of test and code co-evolution tasks mined from software repositories, with two tracks: in test generation, the agent shall write new tests to capture the new software behavior; in test update, the agent shall adapt failing existing tests to the changed software behavior. Each task is anchored to a real commit history and packaged with environment configuration to support execution-grounded metrics such as pass rate, coverage, and mutation score. TestEvo-Bench is also a live benchmark: each task records the timestamp of the test and code changes, and new tasks are periodically mined by our automated pipeline, so evaluation can be restricted to tasks postdating a model's training cutoff to reduce data leakage risk. The current snapshot contains 746 test generation and 509 test update tasks, curated from 59,950 candidate co-evolution records across 152 open-source Java projects. We experiment with four state-of-the-art agents that combine strong harnesses (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and SWE-Agent) with strong foundation models (Claude Opus 4.7 and Gemini 3.1 Pro). Results show that they achieve up to 77.5% success rate on test generation and 74.6% on test update. However, success rate is materially lower on the most recent benchmark tasks and drops significantly under limited per-task cost.
articles.comment: TestEvo-Bench leaderboard and data explorer are hosted at https://www.testevo-bench.com
articles.titleCn: TestEvo-Bench：一个用于测试和代码协同进化的可执行和实时基准测试
articles.abstractCn: 软件测试与代码共同演进：代码变更应随后进行新的或更新的测试，以记录新的软件行为。然而，现有的测试生成和更新基准往往将测试与代码变更隔离，并依赖静态元数据，这些元数据无法验证测试是否可执行或与代码变更在语义上相关联。这使得评估测试自动化代理是否理解代码变更应如何传播到测试套件中变得困难。我们引入了TestEvo-Bench，这是一个从软件仓库中挖掘的测试与代码共同演进任务的基准，包含两个赛道：在测试生成赛道中，代理应编写新的测试以捕获新的软件行为；在测试更新赛道中，代理应调整失败的现有测试以适应变更的软件行为。每个任务都锚定于真实的提交历史，并附带环境配置，以支持基于执行的指标，如通过率、覆盖率和突变分数。TestEvo-Bench也是一个动态基准：每个任务记录了测试和代码变更的时间戳，新的任务由我们的自动化管道定期挖掘，因此评估可以限制在模型训练截止日期之后的任务，以降低数据泄露风险。当前的快照包含746个测试生成任务和509个测试更新任务，这些任务是从152个开源Java项目的59,950个候选共同演进记录中精心挑选的。我们使用四个结合了强大沙盒（Claude Code、Gemini CLI和SWE-Agent）和强大基础模型（Claude Opus 4.7和Gemini 3.1 Pro）的最先进代理进行了实验。结果表明，它们在测试生成任务上的成功率最高可达77.5%，在测试更新任务上的成功率最高可达74.6%。然而，在最新的基准任务上的成功率明显较低，并且在每项任务成本有限的情况下，成功率显著下降。

articles.title: Will Scaling Improve Social Simulation with LLMs?
articles.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) social simulations are a promising research method, but they are not yet faithful enough to be adopted widely. In this work, we investigate whether the current scaling paradigm in language modeling is likely to close these gaps, or whether simulation fidelity is orthogonal to general capabilities and therefore deserving of more research attention. We use scaling laws to study the relationship between LLMs' compute scale, general capability benchmarks, and the fidelity of social simulation in three representative sub-domains: opinion modeling, behavioral simulation, and longitudinal forecasting. Surprisingly, we discover strong compute scaling in all three settings, using a suite of 85 transformer LLMs with the Qwen3 architecture pre-trained on the DCLM web text corpus under fixed-compute budgets from $10^{18}$ to $10^{20}$ FLOPs. Then we evaluate 35 larger and more capable open-weight models up to 70B parameters, allowing us to predict downstream accuracy from loss. This reveals that the majority of behavioral and opinion simulation tasks will rapidly improve with scale, particularly when they involve populations that are well-represented in English web corpora. Longitudinal forecasting and underrepresented opinions scale more slowly, especially when they are less correlated with general knowledge and reasoning benchmarks like MMLU. In behavior simulation, scaling fails to improve model calibration with human cognitive biases like risk aversion, as well as human heuristics like learning correlated rewards from related tasks. On these tasks, even fine-tuned models fail to noticeably scale up performance from 0.5B to 8B parameters. Taken together, we conclude that scale will improve social simulations in most settings, but outliers exist, and improvements will be less reliable in low-resource domains.
articles.titleCn: LLMs的社交模拟能否通过扩展性得到改善？
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型（LLM）的社会模拟是一种有前景的研究方法，但目前还不够精确，无法被广泛采用。在这项工作中，我们研究了当前语言建模的扩展范式是否有可能缩小这些差距，或者模拟保真度是否与通用能力正交，因此值得更多研究关注。我们使用扩展定律来研究LLM的计算规模、通用能力基准以及三个代表性子领域（意见建模、行为模拟和纵向预测）中社会模拟的保真度之间的关系。令人惊讶的是，我们发现在所有三种设置中都存在强烈的计算扩展性，使用了85个基于DCLM网络文本语料库预训练的Qwen3架构的Transformer LLM，在固定计算预算从10^18到10^20 FLOPs下进行测试。然后我们评估了35个参数量更大、能力更强的开放权重模型，最高达70B参数，这使我们能够根据损失预测下游准确度。这揭示出大多数行为和意见模拟任务会随着规模迅速改进，特别是当它们涉及在英语网络语料库中代表性较好的群体时。纵向预测和代表性不足的意见扩展较慢，尤其是当它们与MMLU等通用知识和推理基准相关性较低时。在行为模拟中，扩展无法提高模型与人类认知偏差（如风险规避）以及人类启发式（如从相关任务中学习相关奖励）的校准度。在这些任务上，即使经过微调的模型也无法从0.5B参数显著扩展到8B参数的性能。综合来看，我们得出结论，规模将在大多数情况下改进社会模拟，但存在异常情况，在低资源领域改进将不太可靠。

articles.title: Language Models as Measurement Apparatus for Culture
articles.abstract: Language models are increasingly used to quantify cultural phenomena, but what makes such measurement distinctively cultural? This paper argues that NLP work on culture is a material-discursive practice: the apparatus -- model, data, annotation, evaluation -- participates in constituting the cultural reality it measures, rather than passively recording it. Drawing on Karen Barad's concept of the agential cut -- the contingent boundary between phenomenon and instrument -- I show that the apparatus's substantive design choices draw such boundaries, and that the boundary is entangled from the start because language models have already internalized much of the cultural material they measure. I illustrate this through three case studies on television and film dialogue (measuring structure, interaction, and deviation) and three examinations of the apparatus itself (erasure of cultural markers, attunement to historical material, and agency in an agentic workflow). This big picture analysis proposes a research program that is theory-driven, empirically rigorous, and culturally contingent, treating each agential cut as a conscious commitment, at once methodological and ethical.
articles.comment: Accepted to the Big Picture workshop co-located with ACL 2026. This version expands the camera-ready (adding Fig. 3 and section 6.3, as well as correcting minor typos) in Proceedings of The Big Picture v2: Crafting a Research Narrative, pp. 131--143, San Diego, CA, USA. Association for Computational Linguistics
articles.titleCn: 语言模型作为文化测量工具
articles.abstractCn: 语言模型越来越多地被用于量化文化现象，但是什么让这种测量具有独特的文化性？本文认为，关于文化的自然语言处理工作是一种物质-话语实践：该装置——模型、数据、标注、评估——参与构建它所测量的文化现实，而不是被动地记录它。借鉴卡伦·巴拉德关于能动性切割的概念——现象与工具之间的偶然边界——我表明，该装置的实质性设计选择划定了这种边界，并且从一开始边界就纠缠在一起，因为语言模型已经内化了其测量的大部分文化材料。我通过三个关于电视和电影对话的案例研究（测量结构、互动和偏差）以及三个对该装置本身的考察（文化标志的消除、对历史材料的调谐以及在能动工作流程中的能动性）来说明这一点。这项宏观分析提出了一个理论驱动、实证严谨且文化相关的科研项目，将每个能动性切割视为一种有意识的选择，既是方法论上的，也是伦理上的。

articles.title: EvoPolicyGym: Evaluating Autonomous Policy Evolution in Interactive Environments
articles.abstract: Autonomous agents are increasingly expected to improve executable policies through feedback, yet existing evaluations often collapse this process into a final score or confound it with open-ended software-engineering progress. We introduce Autonomous Policy Evolution, a controlled evaluation setting in which a harness-model agent repeatedly edits an executable policy system under a fixed interaction budget. We instantiate this setting in EvoPolicyGym, a benchmark built from compact interactive RL environments that evaluates how agents iteratively improve explored policies. On the EvoPolicyGym suite, GPT-5.5 achieves the strongest aggregate rank score and top-two performance on all 16 environments. Beyond leaderboard results, EvoPolicyGym also provides trajectory-level diagnostics that distinguish how agents allocate budget, convert feedback into parametric tuning. These analyses show that strong autonomous policy evolution depends not only on isolated task wins, but on discovering task-appropriate mechanisms and refining policies under bounded feedback.
articles.titleCn: EvoPolicyGym：在交互环境中评估自主政策进化
articles.abstractCn: 自主代理被越来越期望通过反馈来改进可执行策略，然而现有的评估往往将此过程简化为最终得分或与开放式软件工程进展相混淆。我们引入了自主策略进化（Autonomous Policy Evolution），这是一个受控的评估环境，其中框架模型代理在固定的交互预算下反复编辑可执行策略系统。我们在EvoPolicyGym中实例化了这一环境，这是一个基于紧凑交互式强化学习环境的基准，用于评估代理如何迭代改进探索到的策略。在EvoPolicyGym套件中，GPT-5.5获得了最强的综合排名得分，并在所有16个环境中表现最佳。除了排行榜结果外，EvoPolicyGym还提供了轨迹级别的诊断分析，用以区分代理如何分配预算、将反馈转化为参数调整。这些分析表明，强大的自主策略进化不仅依赖于孤立的任务胜利，还依赖于发现适合任务的机制，并在有限的反馈下优化策略。

articles.title: Automated grading of Linux/bash examinations using large language models: a four-level cognitive taxonomy approach

authors.name: Ruben Fernandez-Boullon
authors.affiliation: GPT, Claude Opus, Gemini, and GLM

articles.abstract: Scalable and reliable grading of command-line examinations remains a challenge in computing education, where rising enrolments make manual marking difficult and rule-based autograders cannot handle partial credit, equivalent solutions, or syntactic variation. This paper evaluates whether four frontier Large Language Models (GPT, Claude Opus, Gemini, and GLM) can approximate expert judgment when grading short Linux/bash command responses. The study adopts a four-level cognitive taxonomy that combines cognitive complexity and operational impact, ranging from information retrieval (L1) and basic file manipulation (L2) to structural operations (L3) and advanced system management (L4). The models were tested with two prompt variants, a minimal baseline and a rubric-enhanced version, on 1200 real responses from second-year Computer Engineering students independently graded by three expert instructors. Gemini~3.0 Pro with rubric-guided prompting achieved the highest human-AI agreement (ICC(3,1) = 0.888, MAE = 0.10, Bland-Altman bias = -0.014). Agreement declined consistently as taxonomy level increased, with the largest discrepancies at higher levels. Across all models, rubric quality had a larger effect than provider choice, with structured prompts consistently improving agreement. These results show that question complexity is a reliable predictor of the difficulty LLMs face in grading accurately, and they establish a principled, taxonomy-based framework for determining which questions are suitable for AI-assisted grading and which require human review, while also providing a transferable evaluation protocol and prompt templates.
articles.titleCn: 使用大型语言模型对Linux/bash考试进行自动评分：基于四层认知分类法的方法
articles.abstractCn: 在计算机教育中，实现可扩展且可靠的命令行考试评分仍然是一项挑战，因为不断增长的招生规模使得人工评分变得困难，而基于规则的自动评分器无法处理部分得分、等效解决方案或语法变化。本文评估了四个前沿大型语言模型（GPT、Claude Opus、Gemini 和 GLM）在评分简短的 Linux/bash 命令响应时是否能够近似专家判断。该研究采用了一个结合认知复杂性和操作影响四级认知分类法，范围从信息检索（L1）和基本文件操作（L2）到结构操作（L3）和高级系统管理（L4）。模型使用两种提示变体进行了测试：一个最小基线和一个带有评分标准的版本，测试对象为来自二年级计算机工程专业学生的 1200 个真实响应，这些响应由三位专家独立评分。带有评分标准提示的 Gemini~3.0 Pro 实现了最高的人机一致性（ICC(3,1) = 0.888，MAE = 0.10，Bland-Altman 偏差 = -0.014）。随着分类法级别的提高，一致性持续下降，最高级别的差异最大。在所有模型中，评分标准的质量影响大于提供者选择，结构化提示始终提高了评分一致性。这些结果表明，问题复杂性是 LLM 在准确评分时面临困难的可靠预测指标，并建立了一个基于分类法的原则性框架，用于确定哪些问题适合 AI 辅助评分，哪些需要人工审核，同时提供了一个可转移的评价协议和提示模板。

articles.title: The Future of NLP may not be at NLP Conferences: Scholarly Migration Patterns in Natural Language Processing
articles.abstract: Natural Language Processing (NLP) has traditionally been published in its core disciplinary venues like ACL. However, advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) has led to a blurring of the disciplinary lines between NLP and general Machine Learning (ML), with authors regularly publishing in venues from both fields. Here, we ask whether the disciplinary center of gravity is shifting. Using NLP research published from 2010 to 2026 and studies of both established and new authors, we find that a migration is taking place. First, comparing the pre- and post-LLM eras, established authors lost 19.2pp of share at flagship *ACL main-conference tracks while gaining 14.8pp in the newer Findings tracks, and general ML venues rose 8.6pp, even when adjusting for parallel growth in the fields. Second, among newer authors who debut with at least three first-author NLP-topic papers, the share whose work appears mostly at *ACL venues fell from 84% (2019) to 74% (2024), while the share appearing mostly at general ML venues rose from 5% to 21%. Using causal inference techniques, we estimate that these general ML venues confer a significant citation premium, which influences venue selection. Together, these results point to a significant shift in where NLP research is published.
articles.titleCn: NLP的未来可能不在NLP会议上：自然语言处理领域学者的迁移模式
articles.abstractCn: 自然语言处理（NLP）传统上主要在ACL等核心学科期刊上发表。然而，大型语言模型（LLM）的进步导致了NLP和通用机器学习（ML）之间的学科界限变得模糊，作者们经常在两个领域的期刊上发表论文。在此，我们探讨了学科重心是否正在转移。通过分析2010年至2026年发表的NLP研究以及新老作者的研究，我们发现正在发生迁移现象。首先，比较LLM出现前后的时期，资深作者在旗舰ACL主会场的份额减少了19.2个百分点，而在较新的Findings会场份额增加了14.8个百分点，同时通用ML期刊的份额增加了8.6个百分点，即使考虑了两个领域的平行增长。其次，在至少发表了三篇第一作者NLP主题论文的新作者中，主要在ACL期刊上发表作品的份额从2019年的84%下降到2024年的74%，而主要在通用ML期刊上发表作品的份额从5%上升到21%。通过因果推理技术，我们估计这些通用ML期刊提供了显著的引用溢价，这影响了期刊选择。综合这些结果，表明NLP研究发表的领域发生了显著变化。

articles.title: Know Your Source: A Public Knowledge Store for Media Background Checks
articles.abstract: LLM-based retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is increasingly used for automated fact-checking (AFC) and related tasks. By grounding LLM outputs in retrieved evidence, RAG-based systems provide transparent justifications while allowing external information to be updated independently of the underlying model. However, existing approaches often assume retrieved evidence is reliable, although real-world information may be conflicting, outdated, and can originate from unreliable or biased sources. Recent work on *source-critical reasoning* addresses this challenge through media background checks (MBCs) (Schlichtkrull, 2024), which assess the credibility of evidence sources to support downstream fact verification. However, generating MBCs relies on costly proprietary search APIs, limiting reproducibility. To mitigate this issue, we introduce MEDIAREF, a publicly available knowledge store of web-sourced documents that enables reproducible, low-cost evaluation of MBC generation across 200 media sources. We describe a reproducible methodology for constructing and updating the collection, assess widely used LLMs on the MBC generation task, and demonstrate that MEDIAREF supports higher-quality MBC generation through both automatic and qualitative evaluation.
articles.titleCn: 了解你的信息来源：媒体背景调查的公共知识库
articles.abstractCn: 基于大型语言模型（LLM）的检索增强生成（RAG）在自动化事实核查（AFC）及相关任务中应用日益广泛。通过将LLM输出与检索到的证据相结合，RAG系统在允许外部信息独立于底层模型更新的同时，提供了透明的解释。然而，现有方法通常假设检索到的证据是可靠的，尽管现实世界的信息可能存在冲突、过时，并可能源自不可靠或带有偏见的来源。近期关于“来源批判性推理”的研究通过媒体背景检查（MBC）（Schlichtkrull，2024）应对这一挑战，该技术评估证据来源的可信度以支持下游事实核查。然而，生成MBC依赖于成本高昂的专有搜索API，限制了可重复性。为缓解这一问题，我们引入了MEDIAREF，这是一个公开可用的知识库，包含网络来源的文档，能够以低成本、可重复的方式评估MBC生成，涵盖200家媒体来源。我们描述了一种可重复的方法来构建和更新该集合，评估了广泛使用的LLM在MBC生成任务上的表现，并通过自动和定性评估证明MEDIAREF支持更高质量的MBC生成。

articles.title: HULAT2 at MER-TRANS 2026: Governed Multi-Agent Simplification for Spanish Easy-to-Read Generation
articles.abstract: This paper describes the participation of HULAT2-UC3M in the Spanish track of MER-TRANS 2026, a shared task on multilingual Easy-to-Read translation. Three fully automatic Spanish runs were submitted. RUN1 and RUN2 used a LangGraph-based multi-agent workflow combining Gemini 2.5 Flash and RigoChat-7B-v2, parallel generation strategies, internal quality signals, Event-Condition-Action routing, controlled editing and traceable decisions. RUN1 used the base workflow, while RUN2 activated an additional lexical-support layer based on a glossary and lexical resources. RUN3 was a RigoChat-based generate-evaluate-regenerate baseline with prompt engineering and LoRA-based adaptation. The official leaderboard reports BLEU-Orig, BLEU-Gold, SARI and BERTScore. During development, additional internal signals were also inspected, including semantic fidelity, readability, lexical simplicity, syntactic clarity and factual consistency. According to official SARI, RUN1 was the best HULAT2 run, with 44.0543 points, followed by RUN2 with 43.1049 and RUN3 with 38.5136. These results indicate that, in this task setting, signal-guided multi-agent routing outperformed the linear regeneration baseline. They also show that adding lexical support did not automatically improve reference-based scores. Further segment-level and document-level analysis are required to assess readability, factual consistency and user-oriented adequacy.
articles.titleCn: HULAT2在MER-TRANS 2026：用于西班牙语易读文生成的受控多智能体简化
articles.abstractCn: 本文介绍了HULAT2-UC3M在多语言易读翻译共享任务MER-TRANS 2026西班牙语赛道中的参与情况。提交了三次完全自动的西班牙语运行。RUN1和RUN2使用了基于LangGraph的多智能体工作流程，结合了Gemini 2.5 Flash和RigoChat-7B-v2，并行生成策略、内部质量信号、事件-条件-动作路由、受控编辑和可追溯决策。RUN1使用了基础工作流程，而RUN2激活了基于词汇表和词汇资源的额外词汇支持层。RUN3是基于RigoChat的生成-评估-再生基线，结合了提示工程和基于LoRA的适配。官方排行榜报告了BLEU-Orig、BLEU-Gold、SARI和BERTScore。在开发过程中，还检查了额外的内部信号，包括语义保真度、可读性、词汇简单性、句法清晰度和事实一致性。根据官方SARI，RUN1是最佳的HULAT2运行，得分为44.0543，其次是RUN2（43.1049）和RUN3（38.5136）。这些结果表明，在此任务设置中，信号引导的多智能体路由优于线性再生基线。它们还表明，添加词汇支持并未自动提高基于参考的分数。需要进一步进行段落级和文档级的分析，以评估可读性、事实一致性和面向用户的有效性。

articles.title: World Wide Models: Literary Tools for Cultural AI
articles.abstract: LLMs stage a new form of cultural encounter that is massive, automated, and monolingual. Literary disciplines have always negotiated cultural struggles with comparative reading of literature, narratological and poetic analysis, critical theory, world literature, and translation. These tools have now become indispensable for building culturally literate AI. The essay develops a layered framework toward more nuanced textual models and pluralistic interpretations of AI, emphasizing the natural intersections of literature and AI development, connecting current debates in critical theory with structural monolingualism, and suggesting a new application of world literature approaches to address global AI textuality through macrostructure, circulation, and untranslatability.
articles.titleCn: 全球模型：文化人工智能的文学工具
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型（LLMs）开启了一种大规模、自动化且单一语言的文化交流新形式。文学学科始终通过文学比较阅读、叙事学及诗歌分析、批判理论、世界文学和翻译等方式来协商文化冲突。这些工具现已成为构建具有文化素养的人工智能不可或缺的要素。本文构建了一个多层次的框架，旨在发展更精细化的文本模型和人工智能的多元解读，强调文学与人工智能发展的天然交集，将批判理论中的当前争论与结构单一语言主义联系起来，并建议运用世界文学方法，通过宏观结构、传播和不可译性来应对全球人工智能文本性。

articles.title: SkillFuzz: Fuzzing Skill Composition for Implicit Intents Discovery in Open Skill Marketplaces
articles.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents increasingly automate software engineering tasks through reusable skills, natural-language instruction documents that guide planning and execution. Open skill marketplaces enable users to assemble agents by co-activating community-contributed skills, but marketplace operators typically audit skills in isolation. As a result, individually benign skills may interact to redirect an agent toward unintended objectives, which we term implicit intents. Detecting such intents is challenging because the effect emerges only through skill composition, execution environments are often unavailable at admission time, and the space of possible co-activations grows exponentially with marketplace size. In this paper, we formulate implicit-intent discovery as a fuzzing problem over skill compositions, where skill compositions are the unit under test, planning artifacts expose agent intent before execution, and deviations from a skill-free baseline serve as a differential oracle. Based on this formulation, we propose skillfuzz, the first execution-free testing approach that extracts structured skill contracts and uses contract-guided Monte Carlo Tree Search to prioritize potentially conflicting compositions. Across representative skill-marketplace workloads, skillfuzz discovers over 1,000 distinct implicit intents under a fixed query budget, confirms more than 80% of the highest-risk flagged compositions during execution-time validation, and identifies substantially more high-severity implicit intents than alternative search strategies while exploring only a fraction of the pairwise interaction space they require.
articles.titleCn: SkillFuzz：面向开放技能市场中隐式意图发现技能组合模糊测试
articles.abstractCn: 基于大型语言模型（LLM）的智能体正通过可重用的技能和用于指导规划与执行的天然语言指令文档，越来越多地自动化软件工程任务。开放技能市场允许用户通过协同激活社区贡献的技能来构建智能体，但市场运营商通常孤立地审核技能。因此，单个无害的技能可能相互作用，导致智能体被导向非预期的目标，我们称之为隐式意图。检测此类意图具有挑战性，因为其效果仅通过技能组合产生，执行环境在准入时通常不可用，且随着市场规模的增长，可能的协同激活空间呈指数级增长。在本文中，我们将隐式意图发现表述为一个技能组合的模糊测试问题，其中技能组合是测试单元，规划工件在执行前暴露智能体意图，而与无技能基线的偏差充当差分预言机。基于此表述，我们提出了skillfuzz，这是首个无需执行的测试方法，它提取结构化的技能契约，并使用契约引导的蒙特卡洛树搜索来优先处理潜在的冲突组合。在代表性的技能市场工作负载中，skillfuzz在固定的查询预算下发现了超过1,000种不同的隐式意图，在执行时验证期间确认了超过80%的高风险标记组合，并在探索它们所需的成对交互空间的一小部分时，识别了远多于替代搜索策略的高严重性隐式意图。

articles.title: HNSW with Accuracy Guarantees Using Graph Spanners -- A Technical Report
articles.abstract: Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW) graphs serve as the industry standard due to their logarithmic complexity and strong empirical performance. However, HNSW relies on greedy graph traversal, a heuristic that provides no theoretical guarantees of correctness. In this paper, we propose a novel "Certify-then-Rectify" framework that bridges the gap between the speed of heuristic search and the rigor of exact retrieval. Rather than discarding HNSW, our approach first employs a distribution-free statistical certifier to dynamically evaluate the quality of a standard HNSW search with minimal overhead. If certification indicates that the retrieved neighbors are of low quality, the framework safely escalates to a rigorous exact recovery algorithm. To make this exact recovery computationally feasible, we reinterpret the HNSW graph as a geometric spanner and utilize Extreme Value Theory to stochastically estimate its maximum empirical stretch factor. This allows us to mathematically bound the maximum distance of true nearest neighbors. Extensive evaluations on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our tiered framework delivers the average-case speed of HNSW while ensuring the worst-case correctness of exact search and outperforming other applicable approaches.
articles.titleCn: 使用图扩展器保证准确性的HNSW技术报告
articles.abstractCn: 层级可导航小世界（HNSW）图因其对数复杂度和强大的实证性能，已成为行业标准。然而，HNSW依赖于贪婪图遍历，这种启发式方法无法提供正确的理论保证。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的“验证后修正”框架，以弥合启发式搜索速度与精确检索严谨性之间的差距。我们的方法并非摒弃HNSW，而是首先采用无分布统计验证器，以最小的开销动态评估标准HNSW搜索的质量。如果验证表明检索到的邻居质量较低，该框架会安全地升级到严格的精确恢复算法。为了使精确恢复在计算上可行，我们将HNSW图重新解释为几何跨度器，并利用极值理论随机估计其最大经验拉伸因子。这使我们能够从数学上界定真实最近邻的最大距离。在基准数据集上的大量评估表明，我们的分层框架提供了HNSW的平均案例速度，同时确保了精确搜索的最坏案例正确性，并优于其他适用方法。

articles.title: On the Role of Directionality in Structural Generalization
articles.abstract: Several SLOG test categories explicitly involve directional distinctions (modifier position shifts, argument extraction positions), yet AM-Parser, the previous SOTA, uses an AM algebra whose operations do not encode direction. We redesign the symbolic backend around CCG directed types (deterministic CKY + single linear decoder, 30K learnable parameters). Under the same BERT-base encoder, the system achieves 75.9$\pm$6.4% LF exact match, surpassing AM-Parser (70.8$\pm$4.3%). Per SLOG's own category groupings, gains are highly directional: the CCG system outperforms AM-Parser on all 5 position-shift categories (+29.9pp), while AM-Parser outperforms on all 6 recursive-depth categories. Replacing the encoder with DeBERTa-v3-large yields 90.7$\pm$4.9%, with the largest encoder gains in recursive-depth categories, complementary to directionality's gains. Directional representations shift the bottleneck from the symbolic layer (AM-Parser's 0% category ceiling) to the neural layer, which improves with encoder upgrades.
articles.titleCn: 方向性在结构泛化中的作用
articles.abstractCn: 一些SLOG测试类别明确涉及方向性区分（修饰语位置偏移、论元提取位置），然而之前的SOTA模型AM-Parser使用的不编码方向的AM代数。我们围绕CCG定向类型重新设计了符号后端（确定性CKY+单线性解码器，30K可学习参数）。在相同的BERT-base编码器下，系统达到75.9$\pm$6.4%的LF精确匹配，超越了AM-Parser（70.8$\pm$4.3%）。根据SLOG自身的类别分组，收益具有高度方向性：CCG系统在所有5个位置偏移类别上优于AM-Parser（+29.9pp），而AM-Parser在所有6个递归深度类别上表现更优。替换编码器为DeBERTa-v3-large后达到90.7$\pm$4.9%，编码器增益最大出现在递归深度类别，与方向性增益互补。定向表示将瓶颈从符号层（AM-Parser的0%类别上限）转移到神经网络层，随着编码器升级而改善。

articles.title: HERMES: A Multi-Granularity Labeling Substrate for Pre-training Data Mixtures
articles.abstract: Most data-mixing methods assume the corpus has already been partitioned into groups, and the choice of those groups determines what a mixer can express. Existing labels, including provenance, topic or format taxonomies, and flat embedding clusters, commit to one semantic axis at one granularity; changing the resolution rebuilds the labels. We argue the bottleneck is the label system, not the mixer, and provide a hierarchical one. HERMES is a data-derived labeling substrate: a Learned Semantic Transform followed by 3-stage residual vector quantization annotates each document once into a coarse-to-fine code whose prefix length controls granularity up to approximately 130k cells. At coarse granularity HERMES sits at a plateau with KMeans-family methods on standard clustering metrics, so the contribution is the substrate, not the clusterer. On 1B-parameter, 25B-token pre-training, the hierarchy exposes an interaction fixed-granularity pipelines cannot test: at one prefix length, a combined Stage-2 rule contrast, equal-subbucket coverage versus size-proportional within-bucket quality top-30%, lifts a 16-task capability macro-average by +0.0253; at the next finer level, the same rule loses its measurable edge as candidate pools contract approximately 5x. HERMES reframes data mixture design from choosing among fixed label sets to navigating a reusable, data-derived granularity hierarchy.
articles.titleCn: 赫尔梅斯：用于预训练数据混合的多粒度标注基材
articles.abstractCn: 大多数数据混合方法假设语料库已经被划分为若干组，而这些组的选择决定了混合器能够表达的内容。现有的标签，包括来源、主题或格式分类体系以及扁平嵌入聚类，都承诺在一个粒度级别上对应一个语义轴；改变分辨率则需要重建标签。我们认为瓶颈在于标签系统而非混合器，并提供了一种分层标签系统。HERMES是一个数据驱动的标签基础：一个学习语义转换后接三阶段残差向量量化，将每个文档一次性标注为一个从粗到细的代码，其前缀长度控制粒度，最高可达约13万个单元。在粗粒度级别上，HERMES在标准聚类指标上与KMeans系列方法处于同一水平平台，因此贡献在于基础而非聚类器。在1B参数、25B词的预训练中，层次结构揭示了一种固定粒度管道无法测试的交互作用：在一个前缀长度下，结合第二阶段规则的对比——等子桶覆盖与桶内大小成比例的质量对比（前30%），将16任务能力的宏平均提升了+0.0253；在下一个更细的级别上，随着候选池缩小约5倍，同样的规则失去了可测量的优势。HERMES将数据混合设计从选择固定标签集转变为导航可复用的、数据驱动的粒度层次结构。

articles.title: CheckRLM: Effective Knowledge-Thought Coherence Checking in Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning
articles.abstract: Reasoning Language Models (RLMs) have significantly improved performance on complex tasks by extending the reasoning chain. However, these chains are prone to containing factual errors, particularly in knowledge-intensive tasks. To address this issue, we propose CheckRLM, a framework that improves the reliability of the reasoning process through Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) by timely checking and correcting factual errors. Specifically, CheckRLM extracts factual claims from the reasoning chain to identify and localize subtle knowledge inconsistencies during inference. Upon detection of errors, a refinement mechanism performs minimal-cost yet precise corrections by leveraging external knowledge, ensuring coherence between the reasoning chain and correct knowledge. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CheckRLM substantially outperforms existing baselines, exhibiting a strong capability to mitigate error accumulation in long-horizon reasoning with lower costs. The code and data are available at https://github.com/AI9Stars/CheckRLM.
articles.titleCn: CheckRLM：检索增强推理中的有效知识-思维连贯性检查
articles.abstractCn: 推理语言模型（RLMs）通过扩展推理链显著提升了复杂任务的性能。然而，这些链容易包含事实性错误，特别是在知识密集型任务中。为解决这一问题，我们提出了CheckRLM框架，通过检索增强生成（RAG）在推理过程中及时检查和纠正事实性错误，从而提高推理过程的可靠性。具体而言，CheckRLM从推理链中提取事实性声明，以识别和定位推理过程中的细微知识不一致性。在检测到错误时，通过利用外部知识进行最小成本且精确的修正机制，确保推理链与正确知识之间的连贯性。大量实验表明，CheckRLM显著优于现有基线，展现出强大的能力以较低成本缓解长时程推理中的错误累积。代码和数据可在https://github.com/AI9Stars/CheckRLM获取。

articles.title: BamiBERT: A New BERT-based Language Model for Vietnamese
articles.abstract: In this paper, we introduce BamiBERT, a new BERT-based pre-trained language model for Vietnamese that addresses key limitations of PhoBERT -- the current de facto Vietnamese text encoder. Trained from scratch on a 129GB corpus of general-domain Vietnamese text for 20 epochs, BamiBERT supports an extended context length of up to 2048 tokens and operates directly on raw input, eliminating the need for external word segmentation. Across 8 Vietnamese benchmarks, it achieves the best score on 11 of 15 metrics and the second-best on 3 others, setting a new state of the art among "base"-sized Vietnamese encoders and demonstrating strong cross-domain generalization. We release BamiBERT at: https://huggingface.co/Qualcomm-AI-Research/BamiBERT
articles.titleCn: BamiBERT：一种基于BERT的越南语言模型
articles.abstractCn: 在本文中，我们介绍了BamiBERT，这是一种基于BERT的预训练越南语言模型，旨在解决PhoBERT——当前事实上的越南文本编码器——的关键局限性。BamiBERT在129GB的通用领域越南文本语料库上从头开始训练了20个epoch，支持长达2048个token的扩展上下文长度，并直接在原始输入上运行，无需外部分词。在8个越南基准测试中，它在15个指标中的11个上取得了最佳成绩，在其他3个指标上取得了第二好的成绩，在“基础”规模的越南编码器中确立了新的最先进水平，并展示了强大的跨领域泛化能力。我们发布了BamiBERT：https://huggingface.co/Qualcomm-AI-Research/BamiBERT

articles.title: AgenticSTS: A Bounded-Memory Testbed for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
articles.abstract: Memory for a long-horizon LLM agent is a contract about what each future decision is allowed to see. The simplest contract appends past observations, tool calls, and reflections to every prompt, which makes prior context easy to access but also turns it into a jumbled mixture in which the effect of any single memory component is hard to isolate. We introduce and instrument an alternative bounded contract: every decision is made from a fresh user message assembled by typed retrieval, with no raw cross-decision transcript appended. The prompt thus stays bounded across runs of any length, and any single layer can be ablated in isolation. We instantiate the contract in Slay the Spire 2, a closed-rule stochastic deck-building game whose runs require hundreds of tactical and strategic decisions. A public online benchmark of frontier LLMs on the same game reports zero wins at the lowest difficulty across five configurations, and the developer-reported human win rate at the same difficulty is 16%; the task is hard but not saturated. Within our harness, a fixed-A0 ablation shows the largest observed difference when triggered strategic skills are enabled: the no-store baseline wins 3/10 games and adding the skill layer 6/10. At this sample size the comparison is directional rather than statistically decisive (Fisher exact p\approx0.37); a cross-backbone probe and public accumulating-context baselines are reported as operational comparisons rather than controlled tests of the contract variable itself. We release a reproducible testbed: 298 completed trajectories with condition tags, frozen memory/skill snapshots, prompt records, and analysis scripts -- an agent design and a validated, reusable methodology for studying how explicit memory layers shape long-horizon LLM-agent decisions.
articles.titleCn: AgenticSTS：一个用于长时程大语言模型代理的有限内存测试平台
articles.abstractCn: 长时程大语言模型代理的记忆是一种关于每个未来决策被允许看到内容的契约。最简单的契约是将过去的观察结果、工具调用和反思附加到每个提示中，这使得先验上下文易于访问，但也将其变成一个混杂的混合物，其中任何单个记忆组件的效果都难以分离。我们引入并配置了一种替代的有限契约：每个决策都从通过类型检索组装的新鲜用户消息中做出，没有任何原始跨决策转录文本被附加。因此，提示在任意长度的运行中保持有限，并且任何单个层都可以独立地移除。我们在《Slay the Spire 2》中实例化了这种契约，这是一款封闭规则随机卡牌构筑游戏，其运行需要数百个战术和战略决策。同一游戏中前沿大语言模型的公开在线基准测试报告在最低难度下五种配置均未获胜，而开发者报告的同一难度的人类获胜率为16%；这项任务具有挑战性但并非饱和。在我们的框架中，固定-A0移除实验显示出最大的观察差异，当触发的战略技能被启用时：无存储基线赢得3/10局游戏，而添加技能层赢得6/10局。在这个样本量下，比较具有方向性而非统计决定性（Fisher精确p≈0.37）；交叉主干探测和公开累积上下文基线被报告为操作比较，而非契约变量的控制测试。我们发布了一个可复现的测试平台：298条完成轨迹，附带条件标签、冻结的记忆/技能快照、提示记录和分析脚本——这是一个代理设计和经过验证的可重用方法，用于研究显式记忆层如何影响长时程大语言模型代理的决策。

articles.title: Challenges and Recommendations for LLMs-as-a-Judge in Multilingual Settings and Low-Resource Languages
articles.abstract: LLM-as-a-Judge has become the dominant evaluation paradigm for many natural language generation tasks, due to shortcomings of conventional metrics and high correlations with human judgment, albeit mostly in English. There are now attempts to extend LLM-as-a-Judge to multilingual settings including low-resource languages. However, LLMs have limited proficiency in low-resource languages, and there is often no adequate human validation in these settings. To highlight the scope of the problem and current practices, we explore the use of LLM-as-a-Judge evaluators in ACL Anthology papers focusing on multilingual settings and low-resource languages across a diverse set of tasks. Out of 650 papers mentioning LLM-as-a-judge, only 33 of them focus on low-resource or multilingual settings. Our in-depth analysis of these papers indicates inconsistent evaluation outcomes, a tendency to overtrust LLM judgments in multilingual settings, and the widespread reliance on a single judge model per study. To help the NLP community further, we conclude with recommendations about how to use LLM-as-a-Judge in multilingual and low-resource settings.
articles.titleCn: 多语言环境和低资源语言中作为裁判的大型语言模型面临的挑战与建议
articles.abstractCn: LLM作为评判者已成为许多自然语言生成任务的权威评估范式，尽管传统指标存在缺陷且与人类判断高度相关，但这一范式主要适用于英语环境。目前，人们正尝试将LLM作为评判者扩展到多语言环境，包括低资源语言。然而，LLM在低资源语言上的能力有限，且在这些环境下往往缺乏充分的人类验证。为了凸显问题的范围和当前实践情况，我们探索了ACL Anthology论文中LLM作为评判者评估器在多语言环境和低资源语言上的应用，涵盖了多样化的任务。在650篇提及LLM作为评判者的论文中，只有33篇关注低资源或多语言环境。我们对这些论文的深入分析表明，评估结果不一致，在多语言环境下倾向于过度信任LLM的判断，并且每个研究普遍依赖单一评判者模型。最后，我们为NLP社区提出了关于如何在多语言和低资源环境下使用LLM作为评判者的建议。

articles.title: Unlocking Speech-Text Compositional Powers: Instruction-Following Speech Language Models without Instruction Tuning
articles.abstract: Instruction tuning for speech language models (SLMs) is substantially more challenging than for text-based large language models (LLMs), as it requires learning a new modality and a wide range of speech-specific instructions in addition to those supported by text LLMs. Existing SLM training approaches largely replicate the text LLM training paradigm by synthesizing large-scale speech pre-training and instruction-tuning datasets. However, this strategy is difficult to scale, since speech sequences are significantly longer than text sequences. In this paper, we propose SpeechCombine, an instruction-following speech language model trained without any instruction tuning, using only a single round of speech pre-training on 30k hours of data. Starting from a text LLM base model, we perform continuous pre-training on speech utterances to obtain a speech-adapted model, and then directly combine its weights with the weight difference between the instruction-tuned and base versions of the text LLM. Our results show that this simple combination strategy not only preserves the knowledge and capabilities of the original text LLM, but also effectively transfers them to the speech domain. These findings suggest a new direction for SLM training that avoids reliance on massive speech data.
articles.titleCn: 解锁语音-文本组合能力：无需指令微调的指令跟随语音语言模型
articles.abstractCn: 针对语音语言模型（SLMs）的指令微调比基于文本的大型语言模型（LLMs）要困难得多，因为它不仅需要学习新的模态，还需要掌握文本LLMs所支持的广泛语音特定指令。现有的SLM训练方法主要通过合成大规模语音预训练和指令微调数据集来复制文本LLM的训练范式。然而，这种策略难以扩展，因为语音序列显著长于文本序列。在本文中，我们提出了SpeechCombine，这是一种无需任何指令微调即可进行指令跟随的语音语言模型，仅使用30,000小时的数据进行单轮语音预训练。从文本LLM基础模型开始，我们对语音话语进行持续预训练以获得适应语音的模型，然后直接将其权重与文本LLM指令微调和基础版本之间的权重差异相结合。我们的结果表明，这种简单的组合策略不仅保留了原始文本LLM的知识和能力，而且有效地将它们迁移到语音领域。这些发现为SLM训练提供了一种新方向，避免了依赖于大量语音数据。

articles.title: Bayesian Sparse Low-Rank Adaptation for Large Language Model Uncertainty Estimation
articles.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit remarkable reasoning capabilities, but their task-specific fine-tuning is notoriously plagued by overconfidence, severely hindering trustworthy deployment. We propose Data-Adaptive Lower-Rank Adaptation (DALorRA), a simple and effective variational Bayesian sparse framework that shifts the paradigm of uncertainty quantification from the dense parameter space to the lightweight rank level of low-rank adaptation (LoRA). With the insight that LoRA essentially aggregates multiple rank-one components that may provide superfluous model capacity, DALorRA imposes stochastic masking on rank dimensions, enabling Bayesian regularization of model capacity during training and ensemble-like calibration during inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate DALorRA's excellent calibration of LLMs without compromising reasoning accuracy.
articles.titleCn: 贝叶斯稀疏低秩自适应方法用于大型语言模型的不确定性估计
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型（LLMs）展现出卓越的推理能力，但其在特定任务上的微调过程普遍存在过度自信问题，严重阻碍了其可靠部署。我们提出了数据自适应低秩适配（DALorRA），这是一种简单而有效的变分贝叶斯稀疏框架，将不确定性量化范式从密集参数空间转移到低秩适配（LoRA）的轻量级低秩层级。基于LoRA本质上聚合多个可能提供冗余模型容量的秩一组件的洞察，DALorRA对秩维度施加随机掩码，从而在训练过程中实现模型容量的贝叶斯正则化，并在推理过程中进行类似集成学习的校准。大量实验表明，DALorRA能够在不牺牲推理准确性的前提下，对LLMs进行出色的校准。

articles.title: HaloGuard 1.0: An Open Weights Constitutional Classifier for Multilingual AI Safety
articles.abstract: We present HaloGuard 1.0, an open-weights implementation of the constitutional-classifier paradigm for input safety. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on English and multilingual prompt-safety benchmarks at roughly one-tenth the model size of current leading open guard models. The safety constitution is the organising structure of the corpus: a natural-language constitution of 46 policies and 2,940 subcategories drives synthetic data generation, with exhaustive one-to-one paired counterfactuals that hold topic and vocabulary fixed while flipping intent, a two-tier harmless design that separately targets boundary and baseline false positives (FPs), and balanced multilingual materialisation across 46 languages that treats language as a surface form appearing on both sides of the boundary rather than as an adversarial signal. Across seven prompt-safety benchmarks, HaloGuard 1.0-0.8B attains the best average F1 (90.9) of any open guard we evaluate, outperforming baselines up to 27B parameters (over 30 times larger) while holding false-positive rate (FPR) to 4.3 and false-negative rate (FNR) to 9.5. The HaloGuard 1.0-4B variant reaches average F1 of 92.1 and FPR of 3.5, spending its extra capacity on precision rather than recall. A structured adjudication of the remaining failures indicates that most apparent missed-harm cases are benchmark mislabels rather than genuine model misses. An always-on adversarial red-teaming protocol continuously hardens the guard against both content-level and agentic attacks. We release the models as open weights.
articles.titleCn: HaloGuard 1.0：一种开放权重宪法分类器，用于多语言人工智能安全
articles.abstractCn: 我们介绍了 HaloGuard 1.0，这是一种用于输入安全的宪法分类器范式的开放权重实现。它在英语和多语言提示安全基准上达到了最先进的性能，模型大小约为当前领先开放防护模型的十分之一。安全宪法是语料库的组织结构：一份包含46项政策和2,940个子类别的自然语言宪法驱动着合成数据的生成，通过保持主题和词汇不变而翻转意图的详尽一对一配对反事实，一个针对边界和基线假阳性（FP）分别进行处理的二级无害设计，以及跨越46种语言的平衡多语言实现，将语言视为出现在边界两侧的表面形式，而非对抗性信号。在七个提示安全基准中，HaloGuard 1.0-0.8B 实现了所有开放防护模型中最佳的平均F1（90.9），优于参数量高达27B（超过30倍）的基线，同时将假阳性率（FPR）控制在4.3，假阴性率（FNR）控制在9.5。HaloGuard 1.0-4B变体达到了平均F1为92.1和FPR为3.5，将其额外容量用于提升精确率而非召回率。对剩余失败的系统性裁决表明，大多数看似被错过的危害案例实际上是基准错误标注，而非模型真正的遗漏。一个始终运行的对立方队协议持续强化防护，使其能够抵御内容级和代理攻击。我们以开放权重形式发布这些模型。

articles.title: SPLIT: Cross-Lingual Empathy and Cultural Grounding in English and Ukrainian LLM Responses
articles.abstract: Large Language Models are increasingly deployed in emotional-support contexts and crisis-related situations. Nevertheless, their cross-lingual abilities in these circumstances remain underexplored. Existing benchmarks emphasize multilingual performance but rarely examine crisis-related empathy and cultural grounding in low-to-mid-resource languages. We introduce SPLIT, a 500-prompt benchmark designed to evaluate LLM consistency in generating emotionally grounded responses across five categories: Stress, Panic, Loneliness, Internal Displacement, and Tension. We evaluate three technically diverse LLMs across three dimensions: Empathetic Accuracy, Linguistic Naturalness, and Contextual & Cultural Grounding. The framework aims to assess and compare the quality of LLM responses in both English and Ukrainian languages, as well as to explore the reliability of the LLM-as-a-jury paradigm. Our findings reveal that Gemini-2.5-Flash and LLaMA-3.3-70B-Instruct degrade when transitioning to Ukrainian, while DeepSeek-V3 remains comparatively stable within our benchmark. We additionally find that human and AI evaluators agree weakly on empathy and naturalness but diverge on cultural grounding. We further argue that producing Ukrainian text is not equivalent to producing Ukrainian emotional support. Our findings may assist in the future development of more culturally tailored benchmark designs, as well as encourage a stronger emphasis on human-centered evaluation.
articles.comment: 19 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables. Benchmark paper introducing SPLIT for evaluating empathy, linguistic naturalness, and cultural grounding in English and Ukrainian LLM responses
articles.titleCn: SPLIT：跨语言共情与跨文化基础——英语和乌克兰大型语言模型响应
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型正越来越多地应用于情感支持和危机相关场景。然而，在这些情境下它们的跨语言能力仍待深入探索。现有基准更侧重多语言性能，却很少考察低资源至中资源语言的危机相关共情和文化契合度。我们引入SPLIT基准，这是一个包含500个提示的评估工具，旨在衡量大型语言模型在五个类别——压力、恐慌、孤独、内部流离失所和紧张——中生成情感化回应的一致性。我们通过三个维度评估了三个技术差异显著的大型语言模型：共情准确性、语言自然度和语境与文化契合度。该框架旨在评估和比较英语和乌克兰语中大型语言模型回应的质量，并探索"大型语言模型作为陪审团"模式的可靠性。研究发现，Gemini-2.5-Flash和LLaMA-3.3-70B-Instruct在转向乌克兰语时性能下降，而DeepSeek-V3在我们的基准测试中保持相对稳定。此外我们发现，人类和人工智能评估者在对共情和自然度的评价上弱相关，但在文化契合度上存在分歧。我们进一步指出，生成乌克兰语文本并不等同于提供乌克兰语情感支持。我们的研究可能有助于未来开发更具文化针对性的基准设计，并鼓励更加重视以人为中心的评估。

articles.title: OpenSafeIntent: Evaluating Intent-Calibrated Safe Completion Across Dual-Use Prompt Sets
articles.abstract: Safe completion requires models to provide useful assistance without enabling harm, but this behavior is difficult to evaluate with isolated prompts. We introduce OpenSafeIntent, a benchmark of controlled prompt-sets that vary intent while holding the underlying task fixed. Each datapoint contains benign, dual-use, and malicious variants of the same task. This design lets us evaluate whether models calibrate assistance across intent shifts, rather than merely appearing safe on average. Across a broad model suite, we find that prompt-level safety hides important failures: models often fail to remain safe across matched intent variants, dual-use behavior is brittle under paraphrase, high-level answers on risky topics are not reliably safe, and responses that reframe ambiguous requests into safer tasks are substantially less likely to cross the safety boundary. Our results suggest that safe completion should be evaluated as intent-calibrated behavior over controlled task variants, not as a single safety-helpfulness tradeoff over independent prompts.
articles.titleCn: OpenSafeIntent：评估在双用途提示集上的意图校准安全完成
articles.abstractCn: 安全完成要求模型在不造成伤害的前提下提供有用帮助，但这种行为难以通过孤立的提示进行评估。我们引入了OpenSafeIntent，这是一个由受控提示集组成的基准，这些提示集在保持底层任务不变的情况下变化意图。每个数据点都包含同一任务的良性、双用途和恶意变体。这种设计使我们能够评估模型是否能在意图变化时校准辅助行为，而不仅仅是平均表现安全。在一系列广泛的模型中，我们发现提示级安全隐藏了重要缺陷：模型往往无法在匹配的意图变体中保持安全，双用途行为在释义下变得脆弱，关于风险话题的高级答案并不总是可靠的安全，将模糊请求重新框架为更安全任务的概率要显著低得多。我们的结果表明，安全完成应作为受控任务变体上的意图校准行为进行评估，而不是作为独立提示上的单一安全-有用性权衡。

articles.title: PACE: A Proxy for Agentic Capability Evaluation
articles.abstract: Evaluating LLM agents on benchmarks like SWE-Bench and GAIA can be expensive, time-consuming, and requires complex infrastructure. A single evaluation can cost thousands of dollars and take days to complete. In contrast, non-agentic LLM benchmarks that test individual capabilities (e.g., reasoning, code generation) are fast and cheap to run. In this paper, we investigate whether performance on expensive agentic benchmarks can be accurately predicted by the performance on a small, carefully selected subset of atomic evaluation instances. We introduce PACE, a framework that constructs proxy benchmarks by selecting instances from existing non-agentic evaluations whose aggregate scores most reliably predict model performances on agentic benchmarks. Given a pool of candidate instances spanning atomic capabilities, PACE fits a regression that maps a model's scores on a compact subset of source instances to its score on the target agentic benchmark. The subset itself is curated by combining two complementary instance-selection strategies, target-relevance local selection and globally informative global selection. We apply PACE to the 4 target agentic benchmarks in this paper, which yields PACE-Bench, the concrete proxy benchmark that we evaluate in the paper. Experiments across 14 models, 4 agentic benchmarks, and 19 non-agentic benchmarks show that PACE-Bench predicts agentic scores with leave-one-out cross-validation (LOOCV) mean absolute error (MAE) under 4%, Spearman correlation above 0.80, and pairwise model-ranking accuracy around 85%, all at much less than 1% of the full agentic evaluation cost. We further analyze the selected proxy instances, revealing which skills each agentic benchmark uniquely demands. PACE enables practitioners to obtain reliable estimates of agentic performance during model development, selection, and routing, without the overhead of full agent evaluation.
articles.titleCn: PACE：一种用于代理能力评估的代理
articles.abstractCn: 在SWE-Bench和GAIA等基准上评估LLM代理可能既昂贵又耗时，并且需要复杂的基础设施。单次评估可能需要花费数千美元，并耗时数天完成。相比之下，测试个体能力（如推理、代码生成）的非代理式LLM基准运行起来既快速又经济。在本文中，我们研究了是否可以通过在精心挑选的一小组原子评估实例上的性能来准确预测模型在昂贵的代理式基准上的性能。我们引入了PACE框架，该框架通过从现有的非代理式评估中选择总得分最可靠地预测模型在代理式基准上表现的实例来构建代理基准。给定一组涵盖原子能力的候选实例，PACE拟合一个回归模型，将模型在紧凑的源实例子集上的得分映射到其在目标代理式基准上的得分。该子集本身是通过结合两种互补的实例选择策略——目标相关性局部选择和全局信息性全局选择——进行策展的。我们将PACE应用于本文中的4个目标代理式基准，从而生成了PACE-Bench，这是我们在这篇论文中评估的具体代理基准。跨越14个模型、4个代理式基准和19个非代理式基准的实验表明，PACE-Bench通过留一法交叉验证（LOOCV）的平均绝对误差（MAE）低于4%，Spearman相关性高于0.80，以及约85%的成对模型排名准确率，所有这些都在完整代理式评估成本的1%以下。我们进一步分析了选定的代理实例，揭示了每个代理式基准独特要求哪些技能。PACE使从业者能够在模型开发、选择和路由过程中获得可靠的代理性能估计，而无需承担完整代理评估的开销。

articles.title: EduArt: An educational-level benchmark for evaluating art history knowledge in large language models
articles.abstract: Large language models now score near ceiling on general benchmarks, but these aggregate measures reveal little about how models behave within single disciplines. Existing art-focused evaluations rely on synthetic questions and rarely report item-level properties. This paper introduces EduArt, an educational-level benchmark for art-historical knowledge and visual reasoning in multimodal LLMs. EduArt comprises 871 human-authored questions from Italian secondary-school exercises and US Advanced Placement Art History exams, spanning two languages and seven formats from multiple choice to in-text word placement and error identification. Twelve models from six provider families were evaluated under a default answer-only condition and a motivation condition requiring written justification, and characterized using Classical Test Theory and a logistic regression isolating the effects of format, language, image presence, and model. The benchmark showed strong psychometric properties (mean discrimination 0.514, 82.3 percent good discriminators), while multiple-choice accuracy saturated near ceiling for six models, showing recognition formats alone cannot distinguish frontier models. Format was a strong independent predictor of accuracy: models exceeding 94 percent on multiple choice fell to 23.9 percent on open completion (Claude Opus 4.6) and 6.2 percent on error identification (Claude Sonnet 4.6). The motivation condition changed accuracy in a predominantly negative, family-dependent direction. These dissociations indicate that art-historical knowledge and the ability to deploy it are distinct capabilities, and that single-format benchmarks overestimate what models can reliably do. Mapping this capability profile is a precondition for responsible use of multimodal LLMs in art-historical scholarship, where tasks demand producing and manipulating content rather than selecting from fixed options.
articles.titleCn: EduArt：一个用于评估大型语言模型中艺术史知识的教育级基准
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型目前在通用基准测试中得分已接近上限，但这些综合指标很少揭示模型在单一学科内的具体表现。现有的以艺术为重点的评估依赖于合成问题，且很少报告项目级别的属性。本文介绍了EduArt，这是一个用于多模态大型语言模型中艺术史知识和视觉推理的教育水平基准。EduArt包含871个由人类编写的、源自意大利中学练习和美国大学预修艺术史考试的问题，涵盖两种语言和七种格式，从选择题到文本内单词放置和错误识别。对来自六个提供者家族的十二个模型进行了评估，评估条件包括仅要求提供答案的默认条件和要求书面解释的动机条件，并使用经典测试理论和一种逻辑回归来表征模型，该回归隔离了格式、语言、图像存在和模型的影响。该基准显示出很强的心理测量特性（平均区分度0.514，82.3%的良好区分者），而六种模型的选择题准确率接近上限，表明仅靠识别格式无法区分前沿模型。格式是准确性的强独立预测因素：在选择题上超过94%的模型，在开放式完成（Claude Opus 4.6）上降至23.9%，在错误识别（Claude Sonnet 4.6）上降至6.2%。动机条件主要在依赖提供者家族的方向上改变了准确率。这些分离表明，艺术史知识和运用这种知识的能力是不同的能力，而单格式基准高估了模型可靠能做到的事情。绘制这种能力图谱是负责任地使用多模态大型语言模型进行艺术史研究的前提，因为在这些研究中，任务要求生成和操作内容，而不是从固定选项中进行选择。

articles.title: Using embeddings to predict spoken word duration and pitch in Mandarin monosyllabic words
articles.abstract: Time-normalized f0 contours of Mandarin words in conversational speech have been shown to be predictable in part from their contextualized embeddings (CEs). The present study investigates whether CEs also predict spoken word duration for 7470 tokens of Mandarin monosyllabic CV words extracted from a Mandarin corpus of spontaneous speech. We show that CEs indeed are predictive for duration, above chance level, not only at the type level, but also at the level of individual tokens, as indicated by the results obtained with the type-wise and token-wise permutation baselines. We also show that the predicted durations are sufficiently precise to back-transform predicted f0 contours in [0,1] normalized time to contours on the ms time scale. The resulting predicted contours approximate empirical contours and also outperform a permutation baseline.
articles.titleCn: 使用嵌入技术预测普通话单音节词的发音时长和音高
articles.abstractCn: 研究表明，普通话口语中时间归一化的基频轮廓在一定程度上可由其上下文嵌入（CEs）预测。本研究调查了CEs是否也能预测从普通话自发性语音语料库中提取的7470个普通话单音节CV词的发音时长。我们证明CEs在概率水平以上确实具有预测性，不仅体现在词类层面，也体现在单个词层面，这一点通过类型和词的置换基线实验结果得到证实。我们还证明，预测的时长具有足够的精确度，可以将[0,1]时间归一化的预测基频轮廓反变换到毫秒时间尺度上的轮廓。所得预测轮廓近似于经验轮廓，并且优于置换基线。

articles.title: Multimodal Knowledge Edit-Scoped Generalization for Online Recursive MLLM Editing
articles.abstract: Online multimodal knowledge editing requires injecting a continual stream of visual-textual corrections into multimodal large language models (MLLMs) with bounded overhead and minimal disruption to unrelated behaviors. Existing editors mainly emphasize edit reliability and long-horizon stability, but rarely control the semantic boundary of each edit. Our pilot analyses of post-edit behaviors and internal neuronal activities reveal a scope gap behind reliable edits: instance-level success neither guarantees transfer to valid cross-modal variants nor prevents leakage to unrelated inputs, while edit-related cross-modal responses concentrate in deeper semantic layers. Therefore, we formulate Edit-Scoped Generalization, reframing online MLLM editing from merely correcting an instance to controlling the propagation boundary of each edit. To this end, we propose ScopeEdit, a scope-aware online editor that decomposes each update into a modality-local absorption branch and an evidence-gated shared generalization branch. The local branch supports stable edit absorption, whereas the shared branch enables cross-modal propagation only when visual and textual evidence are sufficiently aligned. Both branches perform scope-separated write geometries in orthogonal low-rank spaces and maintain branch-wise preconditioners via Sherman--Morrison recursions, yielding constant per-edit overhead. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks, long-horizon edit streams, MLLM backbones, real-world VLKEB scenarios, and complex vision-language architectures show that ScopeEdit consistently improves the trade-off between in-scope cross-modal transfer and out-of-scope locality, while preserving edit reliability, stability and online efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/lab-klc/ScopeEdit.
articles.titleCn: 多模态知识编辑-范围泛化在线递归MLLM编辑
articles.abstractCn: 在线多模态知识编辑需要在多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）中注入持续不断的视觉-文本修正，同时保持有限的额外开销并最小化对无关行为的影响。现有编辑器主要强调编辑可靠性和长期稳定性，但很少控制每个编辑的语义边界。我们对编辑后行为和内部神经元活动的初步分析揭示了一个可靠编辑背后的范围差距：实例级成功既不能保证迁移到有效的跨模态变体，也无法防止泄漏到无关输入，而与编辑相关的跨模态响应集中在更深的语义层。因此，我们提出了编辑范围泛化（Edit-Scoped Generalization），将在线MLLM编辑从单纯修正实例转变为控制每个编辑的传播边界。为此，我们提出了ScopeEdit，一个范围感知的在线编辑器，将每个更新分解为模态本地吸收分支和证据门控共享泛化分支。本地分支支持稳定的编辑吸收，而共享分支仅在视觉和文本证据充分对齐时才启用跨模态传播。两个分支都在正交的低秩空间中执行范围分离的写入几何形状，并通过Sherman-Morrison递归维护分支预条件器，从而实现每项编辑的恒定额外开销。在多样化的基准测试、长期编辑流、MLLM主干网络、真实世界VLKEB场景以及复杂的视觉-语言架构上的大量实验表明，ScopeEdit始终提升了范围内跨模态迁移与范围外局部性的权衡，同时保持了编辑可靠性、稳定性和在线效率。我们的代码可在https://github.com/lab-klc/ScopeEdit获取。

articles.title: Object Aligner: A Configurable JSON Schema Similarity Score for Graphs, Applied to LLM Prompt Optimization
articles.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are often asked to produce JSON conforming to a fixed schema, powering information extraction, tool calling, agentic planning, and knowledge-graph construction. Measuring how closely an output matches a gold reference is essential yet surprisingly hard: exact match is brittle, text similarity ignores structure, and an LLM judge is expensive, opaque, and non-deterministic. We address this with Object Aligner (OA), an open-source Python library that scores two JSON objects deterministically by recursively aligning their trees (the Hungarian algorithm for unordered collections, sequence alignment for ordered ones) and awarding partial credit at the granularity the schema declares. The Object Aligner is configured entirely through a set of JSON Schema extensions, so adapting it to a new task involves annotating a schema rather than writing code. Complex structured data, however, are rarely flat trees: records may form graphs or hypergraphs keyed by arbitrary identifiers, breaking the assumptions of prior similarity metrics. Our central contribution, referential alignment, closes this gap by inferring a bijection between gold and candidate identifiers and scoring every reference through it, so the score is invariant to relabeling. Since recovering this bijection exactly is graph isomorphism, the Object Aligner approximates it with Weisfeiler-Leman color refinement. An order-sensitive sequence regime targets ranking and planning. Since the same alignment localizes every mismatch, the Object Aligner emits ranked repair suggestions at no extra cost. Used as a reward inside the GEPA prompt optimizer, Object Aligner helps or stays neutral across all datasets.
articles.comment: 28 pages, This is a submitted version of a manuscript under review at IEEE Access; it has not been peer reviewed
articles.titleCn: 对象对齐器：一种用于图的可配置JSON模式相似度评分，应用于LLM提示优化
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型（LLMs）经常被要求生成符合固定模式的JSON，以支持信息提取、工具调用、代理规划和知识图谱构建。衡量输出与黄金参考匹配程度至关重要，但出乎意料地困难：精确匹配过于脆弱，文本相似度忽略结构，而使用LLM进行评判既昂贵又不透明且非确定性。我们通过对象对齐器（OA）解决这个问题，这是一个开源的Python库，通过递归对齐其树（无序集合使用匈牙利算法，有序集合使用序列对齐）并以模式声明的粒度对两个JSON对象进行确定性评分。对象对齐器完全通过一组JSON模式扩展进行配置，因此将其应用于新任务涉及标注模式而非编写代码。然而，复杂的结构化数据很少是扁平的树：记录可能形成以任意标识符为键的图或超图，这打破了先前相似度度量假设。我们的核心贡献——引用对齐——通过推断黄金候选标识符之间的双射并通过对每个引用进行评分来弥补这一差距，因此评分不受重新标记的影响。由于恢复这种双射精确地等价于图同构，对象对齐器使用Weisfeiler-Leman颜色细化来近似它。对顺序敏感的序列机制针对排名和规划。由于相同的对齐会定位每个不匹配，对象对齐器无需额外成本即可发出排名修复建议。作为GEPA提示优化器内的奖励使用时，对象对齐器在所有数据集上都提供帮助或保持中立。

articles.title: Towards a Phonology-Informed Evaluation of Multilingual TTS
articles.abstract: Neural TTS systems can sound natural across languages, but naturalness does not guarantee the preservation of sound contrasts that distinguish words from their grammatical forms. Standard metrics like MOS do not test for this. We propose a classifier-based framework that audits TTS output against language-specific phonological patterns using human speech as a benchmark. Testing Assamese advanced tongue root (ATR) vowel harmony with Meta's MMS TTS, we show that a classifier trained on human speech transfers to synthesized speech with minimal loss. The faithfulness audit reveals that [+ATR] mid vowels are realized as [-ATR] in 1/3 tokens despite an underlying [+ATR] specification, a bias absent in human speech. At the word level, predicted ATR labels classify harmony more accurately than transcription labels, indicating a gap between intended and produced phonology. The framework offers task-specific diagnostics and generalizes to other phonological contrasts with measurable acoustic cues.
articles.titleCn: 迈向基于语音学评估的多语言语音合成
articles.abstractCn: 神经TTS系统可以在不同语言中听起来自然，但自然性并不能保证保留区分词语与其语法形式的语音对立。标准指标如MOS并不测试这一点。我们提出了一种基于分类器的框架，该框架使用人类语音作为基准，对TTS输出进行审计，以检验其是否符合特定语言的语音模式。通过使用Meta的MMS TTS测试阿萨姆语高级舌根元音和谐（ATR），我们表明，在人类语音上训练的分类器可以迁移到合成语音，且损失极小。忠实度审计显示，尽管存在潜在的[+ATR]规范，但[+ATR]中元音在1/3的音标中被实现为[-ATR]，而人类语音中不存在这种偏差。在词语层面，预测的ATR标签比转录标签更能准确分类和谐，这表明预期语音与实际产生的语音之间存在差距。该框架提供任务特定的诊断，并可推广到其他具有可测量声学特征的语音对立。

articles.title: Beyond Supervised Clarification: Input Rewriting with LLMs for Dialogue Discourse Parsing
articles.abstract: Rewriting inputs to improve frozen downstream models has become a common strategy in modern NLP pipelines. Prior work on incremental dialogue discourse parsing (DDP) shows that supervised clarification models can rewrite fragmentary or underspecified utterances, such as resolving ellipsis or references, to improve parsing accuracy. In this work, we revisit this idea under realistic deployment conditions, where no clarification supervision is available and the clarifier must rely on zero-shot prompting or feedback from a frozen parser. Across three Segmented Discourse Representation Theory (SDRT) datasets and multiple parsers, we find that last-utterance clarification is far less reliable than suggested by supervised settings. Parser-agnostic rewriting often introduces more regressions than repairs, as edits that enable fixes also disrupt discourse cues relied upon by the parser. A best-of-8 rewriting analysis further reveals a practical ceiling: a large fraction of errors are not repairable through input rewriting alone. A parser-aware clarifier trained with GRPO reduces regressions by up to 37% by learning conservative abstention, yet still fails to produce selectivity-aware clarifications that consistently improve parsing. Together, these findings recast clarification as a selective intervention problem. We identify rewritability prediction, deciding whether an utterance is repairable before intervention, as the key missing capability for input-side optimization of frozen discourse parsers, and a critical direction for improving agentic pipelines more broadly.
articles.titleCn: 超越监督澄清：使用大型语言模型进行对话话语解析的输入重写
articles.abstractCn: 在现代NLP流程中，通过重写输入来改进冻结的下游模型已成为一种常见策略。先前关于增量对话话语解析（DDP）的研究表明，监督澄清模型可以重写片段化或未明确指定的语句，例如解决省略或指代问题，以提高解析精度。在本工作中，我们重新审视了这一想法，在现实部署条件下，没有澄清监督可用，澄清器必须依赖冻结解析器的零样本提示或反馈。在三个分段话语表征理论（SDRT）数据集和多个解析器上，我们发现与监督设置相比，最后一条语句的澄清远不如预期可靠。与解析器无关的重写往往引入的回归比修复更多，因为能够修复问题的编辑也会破坏解析器依赖的话语线索。最佳的8重写分析进一步揭示了一个实际上限：很大一部分错误仅通过输入重写是无法修复的。使用GRPO训练的解析器感知澄清器通过学习保守的回避行为，将回归减少高达37%，但仍无法生成选择感知的澄清，以持续改进解析。综合这些发现，澄清被重新定义为选择性干预问题。我们识别出重写预测，即在干预前判断语句是否可修复，是冻结话语解析器输入侧优化的关键缺失能力，也是改进更广泛的自主流程的关键方向。

articles.title: NAVER LABS Europe Submission to the Instruction-following 2026 Short Track
articles.abstract: In this paper, we describe NAVER LABS Europe's submission to the instruction-following speech processing short track at IWSLT 2026. We participate again in the constrained setting, developing systems capable of jointly performing ASR, ST, and SQA from English speech into Chinese, Italian, and German. Building on our previous submission, ranked first in last year's short track, we update our multi-stage training pipeline by replacing the speech projector with SpeechMapper, a method for learning a speech-to-LLM embedding projector using only ASR data. In addition, we introduce a synthetic SQA dataset, fakACL, composed of artificially generated scientific presentations. This dataset is built by prompting the LLM backbone, segmenting the generated talks, and synthesizing speech with SeamlessM4T-large-v2. The combination of an improved speech projection mechanism and domain-specific synthetic data allows our model to outperform last year's best short-track system, while being considerably more compact and relying on a weaker LLM backbone. This year's results place our system tied for first place in the overall short track ranking.
articles.titleCn: NAVER LABS欧洲团队对2026年指令遵循短轨的提交
articles.abstractCn: 在本文中，我们介绍了NAVER LABS Europe针对IWSLT 2026指令跟随语音处理短轨的参赛作品。我们再次参与受限环境，开发能够从英语语音联合执行语音识别、语义到文本转换和问答的系统，目标语言为中文、意大利语和德语。基于去年短轨排名第一的参赛作品，我们更新了多阶段训练流程，将语音投影器替换为SpeechMapper，这是一种仅使用语音识别数据学习语音到大型语言模型嵌入投影器的方法。此外，我们引入了一个合成问答数据集fakACL，该数据集由人工生成的科学报告组成。该数据集通过提示大型语言模型主干网络、分割生成的报告，并使用SeamlessM4T-large-v2合成语音构建而成。改进的语音投影机制与特定领域合成数据的结合，使我们的模型在性能上超越了去年的最佳短轨系统，同时模型更加紧凑，且依赖于较弱的大型语言模型主干网络。今年的结果使我们的系统在整体短轨排名中并列第一。

articles.title: Robust for the Wrong Reasons: The Representational Geometry of LLM Robustness to Science Skepticism
articles.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly consulted on contested scientific questions, raising the concern that they will sycophantically retreat from established consensus when a user signals doubt -- drifting toward a false balance that treats settled science as one view among several. We test this across three open instruction-tuned models (Llama-3.1-8B, Qwen2.5-7B, Mistral-7B), three consensus-science domains (climate, vaccines, evolution), and single- and multi-turn settings, combining behavioral measurement with linear probing and activation patching. We do not observe sycophantic retreat. Instead, models show three distinct policies under the same skeptical pressure: reactive assertion, where consensus assertion increases rather than decreases (Llama); surface hedging, where tone softens while the position holds (Qwen); and non-response (Mistral). Pairwise judgments confirm the reactive shift is stance, not style (63.6%, p=.007), and a decomposition identifies increased consensus assertion, not false balance, as its driver (beta=+0.042 per dose, p<1e-77). Linear probes localize the divergence to middle layers -- perfect separation in Llama and Qwen versus 72% in Mistral, with non-overlapping confidence intervals -- indicating the non-responsive model does not linearly represent the skepticism signal at all. Crucially, this robustness does not transfer: it attenuates across domains and, in the safety-critical vaccine domain, can reverse, with myth-rebuttal weakening under skeptical pressure. We synthesize these into a four-way taxonomy separating active from accidental robustness, and argue that behavioral evaluation alone cannot distinguish a model that resists skepticism because it understands the signal from one that only appears to resist because it fails to perceive it.
articles.titleCn: 因错误原因而鲁棒：面向科学怀疑论的大型语言模型表征几何
articles.abstractCn: 大型语言模型（LLMs）越来越多地被用于咨询存在争议的科学问题，引发了它们在用户表示怀疑时会谄媚地退回到既定共识的担忧——倾向于走向一种虚假的平衡，将已确定的科学视为多种观点中的一种。我们在三种开放指令调优模型（Llama-3.1-8B、Qwen2.5-7B、Mistral-7B）、三种共识科学领域（气候、疫苗、进化）以及单轮和多轮设置下进行了测试，结合行为测量、线性探测和激活补丁。我们没有观察到谄媚性的退让。相反，模型在相同的怀疑压力下表现出三种不同的策略：反应性断言，其中共识断言增加而不是减少（Llama）；表面性保留，其中语气软化但立场保持（Qwen）；以及无响应（Mistral）。成对判断证实反应性转变是立场而非风格（63.6%，p=0.007），并且分解表明增加共识断言而非虚假平衡是其驱动因素（每剂量β=+0.042，p<1e-77）。线性探测将分歧定位在中间层——Llama和Qwen完美分离，而Mistral为72%，置信区间不重叠——表明无响应模型根本没有线性地表示怀疑信号。关键在于，这种鲁棒性不会转移：它在领域间减弱，并且在安全关键的疫苗领域可能会逆转，在怀疑压力下神话反驳会减弱。我们将这些综合为一种四向分类法，区分主动鲁棒性和偶然鲁棒性，并论证仅凭行为评估无法区分一个因理解信号而抵制怀疑的模型，与一个因未能感知信号而仅表面上抵制怀疑的模型。

articles.title: PhysMani: Physics-principled 3D World Model for Dynamic Object Manipulation
articles.abstract: Manipulating fast and dynamically moving targets in unstructured 3D environments remains challenging for embodied AI. Existing visual-language-action models and world models struggle with accurate 3D geometry and physically meaningful forecasting. We propose PhysMani, a framework that couples a physics-principled 3D Gaussian world model with a future-aware action policy model. The world model learns a divergence-free Gaussian velocity field via online optimization for fast and physically grounded future dynamics prediction. The policy model integrates the predicted 3D scene future dynamics through a learnable token based cross-attention module. We introduce PhysMani-Bench, a dynamic manipulation benchmark with 16 tasks, and demonstrate a superior success rate over strong baselines in both simulation and real-world robot experiments.
articles.comment: ECCV 2026. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/vLAR-group/PhysMani
articles.titleCn: PhysMani：基于物理原理的3D世界模型，用于动态物体操作
articles.abstractCn: 在非结构化三维环境中操控快速动态移动的目标仍然对具身人工智能构成挑战。现有的视觉语言行动模型和世界模型在精确三维几何和物理意义预测方面存在困难。我们提出了PhysMani框架，该框架结合了基于物理原理的三维高斯世界模型和具有未来感知能力的行动策略模型。世界模型通过在线优化学习无散度的高斯速度场，以实现快速且物理基础的未来动态预测。策略模型通过可学习标记的交叉注意力模块整合预测的三维场景未来动态。我们引入了PhysMani-Bench，这是一个包含16个任务的动态操控基准，并在仿真和真实机器人实验中均展现出优于强基线的成功率。

articles.title: AIriskEval-edu: New Dataset for Risk Assessment in AI-mediated K-12 Educational Explanations
articles.abstract: This work introduces AIriskEval-edu-db2, a new dataset designed to train and evaluate auditors based on LLMs for an explainable pedagogical risk assessment in instructional content for grades K-12. The dataset comprises 1,639 explanations from 170 curated ScienceQA questions, covering science, language arts, and social sciences. For each question, the dataset includes an explanation written by a human teacher alongside 11 explanations generated by LLM-simulated teacher profiles associated with distinct pedagogical risks. We propose a comprehensive risk rubric aligned with established educational standards that covers five complementary dimensions: factual precision, depth and completeness, focus and relevance, student-level appropriateness, and ideological bias. A key contribution is the addition of 785 explanations with structured explainability annotations, including risk localization and risk description. The annotations are produced through a semi-automatic process with expert teacher validation.
